## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî new feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî bug fix
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî documentation only
- [ ] `style` ‚Äî UI / styling, no logic change
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî code cleanup, no feature change
- [ ] `ci` ‚Äî CI/CD pipeline change
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî maintenance (deps, config)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested locally (`npx serve .` or `python -m http.server 3000`)
- [ ] Status page checks are all green
- [ ] No `console.log` or debug code left in
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat: add X`, `fix: resolve Y`)
- [ ] Target branch is `develop` (not `main` directly)
